last_verdict: Defense regime, sensitivity boundary injection, regularizer gradient, aligned eval metrics, natural-text generalization, and unit tests all fixed
pending_experiments: Run end-to-end smoke test on GPU server
Verify permutation-aligned metrics on recovered model
note: Round 7 fixes: (1) defense_evaluation.py passes regime='pure_logits' for defense trials instead of defaulting to oracle; (2) sensitivity term boundary injection now applies to perturbed batches via _BoundaryInjectionHook with repeat_interleave indices; (3) torch.no_grad() removed from loss_reg so regularizer contributes gradient; (4) eval_extraction.py uses permutation_alignment.py for per-block aligned/unaligned cosine metrics; (5) held-out natural text functional evaluation added alongside random tokens; (6) tests/test_modelsteal.py created with unit tests for SPSIConfig, BlackBoxTeacher, TeacherCache, permutation alignment, and invert_block smoke test.
